title: await before an early-return guard
message: This await blocks the function before an early-return that doesn't use the awaited value, so the skip path waits for nothing. Move the await below the guard so it only runs when you need the data
help: Move the `await` below the early-return guard so the skip path stays fast and avoids unnecessary async work.
